Title / description: CLOSER Discovery search across variables, questions, questionnaires, datasets, studies and sweeps
Notes: Use before institutional login for CLOSER-hosted longitudinal studies.

Title / description: CLOSER Discovery content page listing hosted studies
Notes: Shows hosted studies including ALSPAC, MCS, Understanding Society and Next Steps.
Search variables, obtain identifiers and record counts; exported lists can be attached to ALSPAC requests.

Question wording visible?: Detailed data dictionary; likely includes frequencies
Notes: Large public ZIP; use locally if download size is acceptable.
Public ZIP listing variable names and labels by source/timepoint.

Title / description: ALSPAC explore data and samples page
Notes: Central public page linking variable search, data dictionary, variable catalogue, CLOSER and access request.

Title / description: ALSPAC Focusing on You Questionnaire Dataset: includes FoF1 gambling/CPGI items
Notes: Contains fa2100-fa2109, fa2120 and fa2121 gambling/CPGI-derived variables.

Title / description: ALSPAC fa2100: gambled for money in last 12 months
Notes: Direct variable page includes wording and response frequencies.
Direct variable page includes CPGI score and source item lineage.
Direct variable page includes risk category coding and source item lineage.

Title / description: MCS5 Household Grid Dataset includes Cambridge gambling task outcome
Notes: CLOSER hit for gambling is cognitive task outcome rather than gambling behaviour.

Title / description: CLS MCS Age 14 Sweep page with public questionnaire download
Notes: Public route to MCS6 Young Person Questionnaire.

Title / description: Understanding Society Wave 8 code set: Gambling and betting activities
Notes: CLOSER exposes category/code-set label but not a full gambling variable set from this page alone.
Use after CLOSER when CLOSER result is category-level rather than full variable-level.

Title / description: CLOSER Discovery search route for Next Steps gambling checks
Notes: Search completed for gambling; no clear gambling-behaviour variable hit found in first pass. Retain route for reproducibility.
